title: Chess app
description: apps/chess/: Required app. Interactive board with legal move validation (chess.js + chessboard library). Tools: start_game, move_piece, get_board_state, get_legal_moves, resign. Renders board in iframe. Bidirectional: user plays on board, can ask LLM for advice mid-game, LLM sees board state. Full lifecycle: start → play → ask for help → end → LLM discusses.
acceptance_criteria: Chess board renders in iframe. Legal moves enforced. Tools work: start_game, move_piece, get_board_state, get_legal_moves, resign. User can ask LLM for advice mid-game and LLM sees current board. Game end detected and reported. Full lifecycle: start → play → help → end → discuss.
close_reason: Chess app with interactive board, 5 tools (start_game, move_piece, get_board_state, get_legal_moves, resign), bridge protocol, click-to-move UI

title: Bridge protocol + iframe host
description: Client-side AppHost component: loads app iframe with sandbox attributes, manages postMessage bridge. Typed message handling with origin validation. Timeout (30s) and error recovery. Iframe resize support. Server-side invocation routing: receives tool_use from LLM, sends to client, client relays to iframe via bridge.
acceptance_criteria: AppHost component renders iframe with sandbox='allow-scripts'. postMessage send/receive works with typed messages. Origin validation rejects unknown senders. 30s timeout fires and recovers. Iframe resizes on bridge:ui:resize.
close_reason: AppHost iframe component with sandbox, typed bridge protocol, origin validation, 30s timeout, resize support, useBridge hook

title: Fix test files referencing deleted desktop_platform
description: migration.test.ts and sessionActions.test.ts still reference desktop_platform and window.electronAPI. 2 files, trivial fix. Will likely self-resolve when tests are updated by downstream tasks — verify clean before final turn-in.

title: Fork Chatbox and strip Electron
description: Clone chatboxai/chatbox. Remove Electron main process, preload, electron-builder, Capacitor. Keep src/renderer and src/shared. Adapt Vite config for standalone web build. Remove engines.node <23 constraint. Verify pnpm install + pnpm build:web works on Node 24.
acceptance_criteria: pnpm install succeeds on Node 24. pnpm build:web produces working static build. No Electron imports remain in renderer. Dev server starts without errors.
notes: All acceptance criteria pass: install, build, no Electron imports, dev server starts
close_reason: Forked Chatbox, stripped Electron/Capacitor, web-only build works on Node 24

title: App registry + manifest validation
description: Server endpoints: register app (admin only), list apps, approve/block app (teacher+). Manifest validated against Zod schema on registration. App installations per user (teacher+ can install, students use what's installed). Frontend admin panel for app management.
acceptance_criteria: Admin can register app with valid manifest. Invalid manifest rejected with errors. Teacher can approve/block. Student sees only approved+installed apps. App list API returns enabled apps with tool schemas.
close_reason: App registry with manifest validation, approve/block, install/uninstall, enabled apps endpoint, admin panel

title: Content safety middleware
description: Implement the content filter middleware for wrapLanguageModel. Keyword blocklist (configurable). Streaming-aware: buffers sliding window of tokens, checks boundaries. Filters both LLM output and tool results. Teacher/admin can configure filter settings. Log filtered content for review.
acceptance_criteria: Blocklist catches obvious bad words in streaming output. Sliding window handles word boundaries. Tool results filtered before entering LLM context. Teacher can view filtered content log. Filter configurable by admin.
close_reason: Streaming-aware keyword blocklist, filter log, safety API for teachers/admins, configurable blocklist

title: Chat API + streaming
description: Server endpoints: create conversation, list conversations, get messages, send message. Vercel AI SDK integration with wrapLanguageModel middleware stack (content filter placeholder, audit logger, cost tracker). SSE streaming to client. Frontend wired to server API instead of local Chatbox storage.
acceptance_criteria: Conversations CRUD works. Send message streams LLM response via SSE. Messages persisted to Postgres. Middleware stack wired (filter placeholder logs, audit logger records, cost tracker accumulates). Frontend shows streaming response.
close_reason: Chat API with streaming, LLM middleware stack, conversations CRUD, frontend demo page

title: Second third-party app
description: TBD — choose an app demonstrating external_public trust tier (API key, no user auth). Weather dashboard, dictionary, or similar. Simpler than chess: tool invocation + UI render + completion signal. Shows platform flexibility beyond chess.
acceptance_criteria: App registered with external_public trust tier. API key stored server-side. Tool invocation works. UI renders in iframe. Completion signal returns result to LLM.
close_reason: Wordle app (external_public tier) with dictionary API validation via bridge:api:request proxy, board UI, keyboard, 3 tools. Also wired up bridge:api:request in AppHost and built server API proxy endpoint.

title: Deploy to Linode
description: Production deployment on Linode VPS. Docker Compose for Postgres. PM2 for Node services (Express backend, static frontend serve or Nginx). HTTPS via Let's Encrypt / Caddy. Environment variable management. Verify publicly accessible with working chat + app integration.
acceptance_criteria: App accessible at public URL via HTTPS. Chat works. At least one app integration works end-to-end in production. Postgres running in Docker. Node managed by PM2.

title: Tool pipeline integration
description: Wire it all together: LLM tool schemas injected from user's enabled apps. When LLM emits tool_use, server validates against app schema, routes to client, client loads iframe and invokes via bridge. App result flows back through content filter to LLM context. Completion signaling. Circuit breaker (3 fails/5min).
acceptance_criteria: LLM sees tools from enabled apps. tool_use triggers validation + routing to iframe. App result returns to LLM context. LLM continues response incorporating result. Circuit breaker disables app after 3 failures. Full lifecycle works for one test app.
close_reason: Full tool pipeline: LLM tool injection, server-holds-connection execute via iframe, circuit breaker, audit logging, frontend AppHost integration

title: Developer docs + API guide
description: docs/app-developer-guide.md: How to build a third-party app for ChatBridge. Manifest format, bridge protocol, tool schema authoring, auth tiers, testing locally. apps/_template/ starter with working example. This is a PRD deliverable.
acceptance_criteria: docs/app-developer-guide.md covers: manifest format, bridge protocol, tool schemas, auth tiers, local testing. apps/_template/ contains working starter app. A developer could build an app from the docs alone.

title: Strip unused Sentry dependency
description: @sentry/react kept in package.json because 18 files import it. Not initialized — no-ops at runtime. Replace with no-op stubs or remove imports. Will likely self-resolve as files are rewritten by downstream tasks — verify clean before final turn-in.

title: User auth (JWT)
description: Register/login endpoints. Bcrypt password hashing. JWT access tokens. Auth middleware for protected routes. Three roles: student, teacher, admin. Seed a default admin user. Frontend login/register pages wired to auth store.
acceptance_criteria: POST /api/auth/register, POST /api/auth/login work. JWT issued on login. Protected routes return 401 without valid token. Three roles enforced. Frontend login/register flow works end-to-end.
close_reason: JWT auth with register/login/refresh/me endpoints, auth middleware, role guards, frontend login/register pages with route guard

title: Third third-party app (OAuth)
description: TBD — choose an app demonstrating external_auth trust tier (OAuth2 flow). Must show: OAuth consent popup, server-side token custody, proxied API calls via bridge:api:request. Shows the full auth architecture works.
acceptance_criteria: OAuth consent flow opens in popup. Tokens stored server-side encrypted. App makes proxied API calls via bridge:api:request. Token refresh works. Full lifecycle demonstrated.

title: PostgreSQL schema + Docker setup
description: docker-compose.yml with Postgres 16. Run schema.sql from ARCHITECTURE.md: users, conversations, messages, apps, app_installations, tool_invocations, oauth_tokens, conversation_summaries. Typed query layer with pg + Zod validation on results.
acceptance_criteria: docker compose up -d starts Postgres. All tables from schema.sql created. Typed query helpers compile. Seed script creates default admin user.
close_reason: PostgreSQL 16 Docker setup, 8-table schema, Zod-validated typed query layer, admin seed script

title: Conversation summaries (Loop C seed)
description: On conversation close: server generates structured summary via LLM (topics, apps used, outcomes). Stored in conversation_summaries table. Student profile view aggregates past summaries. System prompt injects recent summaries for cross-session continuity. This is the demo seed for the three-loop architecture.
acceptance_criteria: Conversation close triggers LLM summary generation. Summary stored with topics and apps_used arrays. Student profile page shows past summaries. New conversation system prompt includes recent summaries. Demo clearly shows cross-session awareness.

title: Fix pre-existing type errors from upstream Chatbox
description: 192 type errors inherited from Chatbox: extensionless imports, type mismatches in model providers. Pre-existing, not introduced by our Electron strip. Will likely self-resolve as downstream tasks modify files — verify clean before final turn-in.

title: Shared types + Zod schemas
description: src/shared/types/app.ts (AppManifest, AppToolDef, AppPermission, TrustTier). src/shared/types/bridge.ts (all Bridge message types). src/shared/schemas/ with Zod schemas for manifest validation, bridge message validation. These are consumed by both server and client.
acceptance_criteria: AppManifest, AppToolDef, BridgeMessage union types compile. Zod schemas validate correct manifests, reject invalid. Schemas importable from both server/ and src/renderer/.
close_reason: Shared types and Zod schemas for AppManifest, AppToolDef, AppPermission, TrustTier, and all Bridge protocol messages

title: Express server scaffold
description: Create server/ directory with Express + TypeScript. Health endpoint, CORS, JSON body parser. Vite dev proxy from frontend to backend. PM2 ecosystem config for production.
acceptance_criteria: GET /api/health returns 200. CORS configured. Vite dev proxy forwards /api/* to Express. PM2 config exists.
close_reason: Express server scaffold with health endpoint, CORS, JSON body parser, Vite dev proxy, PM2 config

title: Teacher safety dashboard
description: Frontend /admin/safety page for teachers and admins. Filter log table (severity badges, user, timestamp, matched words, conversation link). Critical-alert highlight for self-harm signals. Blocklist editor for admins. API client functions for GET /api/safety/log and GET/PUT /api/safety/blocklist (endpoints already exist). Small scope, high demo impact.

title: Presearch document + architecture video
description: Write the presearch PDF: ~500-word Case Study Analysis, technical architecture overview, three-loop agent design rationale. Record 3-5 min architecture video. Due Tue 2026-03-31 midnight CT.
acceptance_criteria: Presearch PDF with ~500-word Case Study Analysis section. Architecture video 3-5 min. Both submitted before Tue midnight CT.
